en-US.name: Grok Voice
en-US.summary: Ask Grok anything by voice. Free daily questions; upgrade to Premium for unlimited Grok with memory.
en-US.description:
Grok Voice lets you talk to xAI's Grok through Alexa.

FREE TIER
• Limited free questions per day
• Fast Grok answers optimized for voice
• Optional Query Boost packs for extra questions

PREMIUM SUBSCRIPTION
• Unlimited questions
• Smarter Grok model
• Conversation memory across sessions
• Priority-style longer answers

Just say: Alexa, open Grok Voice. Then ask anything.

Examples:
• What is quantum computing?
• Explain black holes simply
• Why is the sky blue?

Privacy: Your questions are sent to the xAI Grok API to generate answers. See our privacy policy for details.

This skill is not affiliated with or endorsed by xAI beyond use of the Grok API.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Grok Voice what is gravity
Alexa, tell Grok Voice to upgrade

publishingInformation.testingInstructions:
1. Enable the skill and say Open Grok Voice.
2. Ask a general knowledge question.
3. Exhaust free daily queries (or set FREE_DAILY_LIMIT low in Lambda) to test upsell.
4. Use Buy premium and Buy query boost with ISP test accounts.
5. Verify inventory and status intents.
6. Ensure XAI_API_KEY is set on the Lambda.
